name: Sakol Energy Public Company Limited
summary: Sakol Energy Public Company Limited operates in the energy industry in Thailand. The company provides natural gas compression services to the natural gas transportation vehicles of PTT Public Company Limited. It also produces and sells compressed bio-methane gas; operates biomass power plant with the installed capacity of 9.9 MW; and rents real estate property. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Pathum Thani, Thailand.
